name: 18. Phan tich master prompt va validate do chinh xac bang NotebookLM

parameters.content:
## Workflow con: Master prompt accuracy validation

Chay MCP server truoc:
`cd /Users/apple/Desktop/ex_project_8/mtips5s_mcp_ml && npm run build && node dist/index.js --transport http --port 3000 --host 127.0.0.1`

Input toi thieu:
- `master_prompt`: ban master prompt can validate
- `research_pack` / `content_skeleton` / `competitor_analysis`: nguon doi chieu
- `notebook_id` hoac `notebook_url`: notebook dich

Neu dung `*_path`, n8n Code node can doc duoc `node:fs/promises`. Neu moi truong chan fs, hay truyen thang text vao cac input tuong ung.

Output chinh:
- `answer`: verdict va phan tich cua NotebookLM
- `citations`: nguon/citation neu `source_format=json`
- `validation_prompt`: prompt da gui vao NotebookLM
- `source_added`: ket qua nap source vao notebook

nodes.name: Validate Master Prompt with NotebookLM MCP
